creator: p-fbsd-bugs@ziemba.us
text:
Hmm, Not sure why I didn't notice your earlier note of 18 Aug 2011.
Sorry about that.

Here is my working configuration:

mailbox {
    type imap
    server imap.gmail.com
    user myemail@gmail.com
    password mypassword
    timeout 120
    update 900
    persistent no
    ssl yes
    # Depends on /usr/ports/security/ca_root_nss being installed
    trustedCaDir /u/paul/.certs/
}

-- 
G. Paul Ziemba
FreeBSD unix:
 9:16AM  up 4 days,  7:02, 13 users, load averages: 0.00, 0.08, 0.08
